videos.title: "Tour of Anchorage" races held at Kincaid park Sunday
videos.description:
"Tour of Anchorage" races held at Kincaid park Sunday
  
 For more Local News from KTUU:  https://www.alaskasnewssource.com/
 For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJZWh6xwfsZe7NrjHo4OvGg
videos.transcript:
the Nordic ski Association of Anchorage
held their annual tour of Anchorage race
on a shorter than usual route in kin
Kade park today the race typically runs
across Anchorage from point to point but
due to a lack of snow organizers had to
switch to a multi-lap format skiers
lined up at the start of a 5 km course
for the 50 40 and 25 km racer races
organizers said that while this winter
has been tough for ski conditions they
were fortunately able to hold the rise
despite the altered
course of course everybody knows we've
had a challenging winter but we tried to
stay optimistic try to stay creative and
we're really happy that we could build
things out and do a 5 kmet Loop for the
skiers we have a pretty unique 12K Loop
for the bikers out here and the sun is
shining today and music is pumping and
we're having a great time hopefully we
don't have to do another multi-lap
course for a while you know I I prefer
the point to point it's just fun and you
know a tradition something to look
forward to but uh
yeah no it was uh awesome to be able to
hold an invent just you know given the
conditions in addition to the ski races
bat tire bikers competed in 25 40 and 50
km races as well Racers said that
despite the wet and windy conditions the
course was in good shape and the warmth
made it more comfortable as well

videos.description: Some skiers turning onto the Viewpoint Trail.

videos.title: Life of The Alaska State Champs

Cross Country Junior Nationals 2019 Athlete Video Contest

videos.title: 25K Tour of Anchorage - Lisa Minn
videos.description: Teammate Lisa Minn passing through aid station #3 on her way to a medal-winning finish!

videos.title: The Oosik Classic - Alaska's wildest ski race
videos.description:
My experience at Alaska's wildest ski race. A fairytale ski around the tiny outpost of Talkeetna, Ak.

FYI, according to Urban Dictionary:
Oosik-
1.) Penis bone commonly found in walruses and related species
2.) A petrified walrus penis
3.) An Alaskan swear word meaning dick

videos.title: 25K Tour of Anchorage Start
videos.description: Steve Mezak and Team in Training teammates in wave 6 of stride skiers at the start of the 25K Tour of Anchorage at 9:40am on March 8, 2009. Video (and cowbell) by Paula Mezak.
